What KYROO handles

Your whole life.
One AI.

Six domains. One conversation. Everything connects.

💪
Fitness
Workouts, recovery, and nutrition tracked daily. KYROO nudges you when you slip and celebrates every win.
WorkoutsRecoveryNutrition
💰
Money
Budget tracking, spending alerts, savings nudges. No bank access. Just smart advice when you need it.
BudgetsAlertsSavings
🧠
Mind
Mood tracking, CBT journaling, emotional memory. KYROO remembers how you felt last week.
MoodCBTMemory
😴
→
Sleep
Sleep scoring, circadian nudges, energy forecasts. Wake up actually optimised every morning.
🎯
→
Goals
Set it once, KYROO tracks it daily. Gentle accountability that actually works.
📁
→
File Tools
Convert PDFs, read documents, crunch spreadsheets — all inside WhatsApp.
KYROO
YOUR AILIFE COMPANIONALWAYS ONLINE
A day with KYROO

Every day
has a shape.

KYROO checks in at the right moments. Not too much. Just enough.

K
KYROO
Good morning! 🌅 Sleep: 6.8 hrs · Recovery: 72% Today's budget left: ₹1,240 Mood trend: 📈 up 3 days straight One thing for today: 20 min walk before lunch.
🌅
7:00 AM
Morning Brief
💸
12:30 PM
Spending Alert
K
KYROO
Hey — ₹340 just went to Swiggy 👀 You're at 78% of today's food budget. Dinner at home = ₹0 and you still hit your goal. Worth it?
K
KYROO
You haven't moved much today 🚶 Just 20 min now = 4/7 days this week. That streak is worth protecting. Want a quick home workout? Takes 18 min.
💪
6:30 PM
Workout Check-in
🌙
10:00 PM
Evening Wrap
K
KYROO
Day wrap ✨ ☀️ Great energy day 🥗 Ate well (mostly!) 💸 Saved ₹340 📚 Skipped workout Tomorrow: let's protect that morning walk.
Simple setup

Up in 3 minutes.

No app download. No new account. Just WhatsApp.

✍️
Step 01
Sign up
10 quick questions. Tell KYROO your goals, lifestyle, habits, and how you communicate.
Takes ~2 min
💬
Step 02
Connect WhatsApp
KYROO slides into your WhatsApp. No download, no new app. Just your number and a quick verify.
Takes ~1 min
🚀
Step 03
Let it run
Daily briefs, real-time nudges, weekly reports. KYROO learns you and gets smarter every week.
Takes Forever

Languages supported

Real people

What they say after 30 days.

"
It's like having a personal trainer, financial advisor, and therapist in one WhatsApp chat. Genuinely changed how I start my mornings.
Priya M.
Product Designer, Bengaluru
"
The spending alerts alone saved me ₹8,000 last month. That's my Netflix + Spotify + rent contribution right there.
Arjun S.
Software Engineer, Mumbai
"
I've tried every habit app. None of them talked back. KYROO gets context and responds like a friend who actually knows me.
Ananya K.
MBA student, Delhi
Simple pricing

Less than your morning chai.

Replaces ₹48,000/month in professional fees.

FREE
₹0
forever
  • ✓1 AI module
  • ✓5 messages/day
  • ✓Hindi + English
  • ✓Daily nudge
Most popular
PRO
₹999
/month
  • ✓All 4 modules
  • ✓50 messages/day
  • ✓Voice + images

  • ✓Emotion detection
  • ✓File conversion
PRO PLUS
₹1,999
/month
  • ✓Everything in PRO
  • ✓150 messages/day
  • ✓Monthly audit PDF
  • ✓Top-up credits
  • ✓Human support
